title: What’s going on with Developers and AI?
summary: Google Cloud Tech discusses how AI tools and "vibe coding" are transforming software development, from early programming history through the modern LLM era. The video highlights how AI Studio and similar tools are lowering barriers to application development and making it an exciting time for developers.
